title: Nyf's Modpack Version Check
description: Adds modpack version to the server Screen, prevents connection if versions mismatch
body:
This mod adds a Config File to control the version of your modpack and prevent connection to servers with the wrong Modpack Version.

How to use:
 1. Find your modpacks Config Folder.
 2. Open the config file called nmpvc-common.toml in your favorite text editor.
 3. Change the version number "1.0.0" in modpack-versions = "1.0.0" to whatever version your modpack is.
 4. Save the file. 
 5. Make sure you include this mod in your modpack both client and server.
 6. Remember to do this EVERY TIME you change your modpack version.

To be VERY clear, If you followed the steps above, people will not be able to join a server that is using your modpack if they have the wrong modpack version.
